name: Spicy Coaltana Defense
description: System entry for the Spicy Coaltana defense event inside the EverChar Coal Bag at the BBQ Spill. It is a MIX.R-style defense focused on surviving the heat while protecting the sword.
behavior: The entire event revolves around ambient heat and waves made entirely of Ladybird Larvae that emerge from the ground to attack either the sword or the player.
interactionWithPlayer: The event begins when you interact with the sword trapped in the coal bag. If you let it break or fail the sequence, you need to properly reset and start the defense again.
interactionWithCreatures: The event larvae do not exist to duel you cleanly; their job is to flood the area, burrow, re-emerge, and force you to choose between cooling off and protecting the sword.
strategy: Preparation decides the event: high sizzle protection, good healing, and fresh damage make a huge difference. The Mint Mace and other Ladybird Larva counters can turn a brutal defense into something manageable, as long as you do not lose the center of the arena.
environments: EverChar Coal Bag at the BBQ Spill

loot.item: Can contribute to unlocking or upgrading Guard Dog

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: The real pressure comes from ambient sizzle and repeated Ladybird Larva waves, not from one fixed enemy.

abilities.name: Constant Sizzle
abilities.description: The center of the arena punishes you passively for the entire event, so you cannot defend as if it were a neutral arena.

abilities.name: Ladybird Larva Waves
abilities.description: All waves are made of Ladybird Larvae that emerge from the ground and force you to watch the perimeter around the sword.

abilities.name: Recipe Defense
abilities.description: The reward is the recipe, not the weapon for free, so the event remains a progression gate instead of a direct drop.

abilities.name: Guard Dog Progress
abilities.description: Winning this defense also contributes toward unlocking or advancing the Guard Dog mutation.

specialTraits: The event feels more like a special defense than a boss fight.
The entire defense revolves around Ladybird Larvae and heat management.
Aphidex also treats it as a useful entry for tracking Guard Dog progress.
